mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth exceeding the long-run trend rate compresses equity risk premiums by confirming durable economic expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-GDP-growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 8.0 percent signals labor market normalization, which boosts consumer spending expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in less than 55% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power when controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in industrial production and housing starts indicate synchronized supply-side capacity expansion and durable goods demand, which lifts corporate earnings expectations and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a single-proxy baseline in out-of-sample walk-forward testing, or forward returns turn negative when both series rise concurrently.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained federal funds rate below 0.50 percent reflects accommodative monetary policy that lowers discount rates for equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the following week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in sub-0.50% environments do not exceed the historical median by at least 0.5%, or the signal reverses when CPIAUCSL accelerates above 3.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in retail and food services sales exceeding 2.0 percent confirms accelerating consumer demand, which lifts near-term earnings guidance and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The signal generates negative or flat 20-day forward returns in more than 40% of triggered instances, or predictive power vanishes when controlling for PAYEMS growth.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent month-over-month growth in the industrial production index reflects sustained manufacturing capacity utilization, which supports corporate revenue trajectories and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns show no statistical difference between rising and falling INDPRO periods.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent rises in nonfarm payrolls and the consumer price index signal wage-price inflation dynamics that force monetary tightening, which compresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following week.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative 5-day returns when both series rise, or forward returns are statistically indistinguishable from zero in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly housing starts reading above 600 thousand units indicates robust construction activity and consumer confidence, which lifts financial and cyclical sector earnings expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in high-starts environments do not exceed the baseline median by at least 0.4%, or the signal reverses when FEDFUNDS exceeds 2.0%.
